items.label: Development Complete — Schemas
messages: Now let me explore the existing schemas structure to understand the patterns.
Let me read the actual schema files directly to understand the existing patterns.
I now have full context on the existing patterns. Let me implement the webhook schemas.
Now add comprehensive tests for the webhook schemas:
Now append the webhook schema tests at the end of the test file:
Now let me build and test:
All 53 tests pass (including 23 new webhook schema tests). Now let me run the post-change review and commit:
Review shows: no breaking changes, moderate risk score (purely from novelty of new files), minimal structural impact (1.6% of graph). All clean. Now commit and complete:

All done. Here's a summary of what was completed:  ## Schema Development Complete ✅  ### Files Created - **`packages/schemas/src/webhooks.ts`** — Three Zod schemas as specified:   - `WebhookSchema` — Full webhook record (`id`, `workspaceId`, `url` with `.url()` validation, `createdAt` with `.datetime()` validation)   - `CreateWebhookRequestSchema` — POST request body (`url` with `.url()`, `workspaceId`)   - `WebhookListResponseSchema` — GET response envelope (`webhooks: z.array(WebhookSchema)`)   - All three types exported via `z.infer<>`  ### Files Modified - **`packages/schemas/src/index.ts`** — Added barrel re-exports for all 3 schemas + 3 types following existing pattern - **`packages/schemas/src/__tests__/schemas.test.ts`** — Added 23 new round-trip tests covering:   - Valid parsing, missing fields, invalid URLs, non-ISO dates, extra field stripping, empty objects, empty arrays, multiple items, invalid items in arrays  ### Validation - ✅ `npm run build` — TypeScript compiles clean - ✅ `npx jest --verbose` — All 53 tests pass (30 existing + 23 new) - ✅ No breaking changes (additive only) - ✅ Roam review: minimal structural impact (1.6% of graph), zero breaking changes

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh backend "feat(schemas): add webhook dispatcher Zod schemas (WebhookSchema, CreateWebhookRequestSchema, WebhookListResponseSchem
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:complete webhook-dispatcher schema-dev 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark Development Complete — Schemas" 2>&1
